content.body: annevk: in https://github.com/whatwg/html/pull/12389 was you intention that parsing `<video muted>` should fire the volumechange event? It hinges on "Whenever either of the values that would be returned by the volume and muted IDL attributes change" and whether we consider element creation + attribute setting by the parser an atomic thing or not.
content.formatted_body: annevk: in https://github.com/whatwg/html/pull/12389 was you intention that parsing <video muted> should fire the volumechange event? It hinges on "Whenever either of the values that would be returned by the volume and muted IDL attributes change" and whether we consider element creation + attribute setting by the parser an atomic thing or not.
